case_title: ROBERT KIKUCHI-YNGOJO et al VS. GANESHA BALUNSAT

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFFS REGARDING THE DATES THEY ARE AVAILABLE IN SAN FRANCISCO - FEB. 16; MAR. 1, 2; APR. 12, 13. CASE IS ALREADY SCHEDULED ON FEB. 11, 2010.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIKUCHI-YNGOJO, ROBERT (OWNER OF VEHICLE) WANG, NANCY (SPOUSE)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-12-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIKUCHI-YNGOJO, ROBERT (OWNER OF VEHICLE) WANG, NANCY (SPOUSE) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALUNSAT, GANESHA $2,129.02 PRINCIPAL, $144.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,273.52, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF USE (CAR RENTAL) CONTENTS OF VEHICLE, AND PLAINTIFF'S $900.00 DEDUCTIBLE. DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR THEIR PRIOR PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
